top_signals.title: Delta's Peter Carter on Consumer Premium Travel Appetite
top_signals.summary: Delta Airlines President Peter Carter speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) on consumers "insatiable appetite" for premium travel. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
